about.label: About Chronos
about.description_1: Chronos is a curated luxury house dedicated to precision, craftsmanship, and timeless design.
about.description_2: We carefully select refined timepieces, premium leather goods, and distinctive art pieces — each chosen for its detail, quality, and presence. At Chronos, luxury is intentional, balanced, and enduring.

testimonials.quote: The Royal Chronograph exceeded every expectation. The attention to detail and the personalized service from Chronos made this acquisition truly special. A masterpiece for my collection.
testimonials.name: Alexander Rothschild

testimonials.quote: An extraordinary experience from start to finish. The craftsmanship and exclusivity are unmatched in the world of luxury timepieces.
testimonials.name: Isabella Laurent

testimonials.quote: Chronos redefines what luxury means. From the private viewing to the final delivery, every detail was handled with exceptional care and professionalism.
testimonials.name: Sebastian Müller

testimonials.quote: Owning a piece from Chronos feels like owning a work of art. The exclusivity, craftsmanship, and service are truly world-class.
testimonials.name: Valentina Russo

testimonials.quote: The level of trust and transparency Chronos provides is rare in today’s luxury market. Every acquisition feels personal and meaningful.
testimonials.name: Daniel Whitmore

questions.question: Do you offer shipping?
questions.answer: Yes, we provide shipping within the United Arab Emirates, across the GCC, and internationally worldwide.

questions.question: What are the delivery timelines?
questions.answer:
Within the UAE: within 24 hours.
GCC countries: 2–3 business days.
International shipping: approximately 7 business days depending on the destination.

questions.question: Can I request a specific item?
questions.answer: Yes. Chronos offers a dedicated special-order service. Whether you are looking for a specific model or a distinctive piece, our team can source it with precision and care.

questions.question: How can I contact Chronos?
questions.answer: You may contact us directly via WhatsApp or through the official email listed on our Contact page.

sections.title: Introduction
content: Chronos LLC ("Chronos", "we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or make a purchase from us.
Please read this policy carefully. If you disagree with its terms, please discontinue use of our site.

sections.title: Information We Collect
content: When you place an order or contact us, we may collect:
list: Payment confirmation (processed securely via third-party payment providers)
post_content: We may also automatically collect basic technical data such as IP address, browser type, and usage information to improve our website performance.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
content: We use your information to:
list: Improve our services and website experience

sections.title: Sharing of Information
content: We may share necessary information with:
post_content: We do not sell or trade your personal information.

sections.title: Cookies
content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website performance. You may disable cookies through your browser settings if preferred.

sections.title: Data Security
content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no online transmission can be guaranteed as completely secure.

sections.title: Contact
content: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

sections.title: Agreement to Terms
content: By accessing or using the Chronos website ("Site") or purchasing any product from us, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, please refrain from using our Site or services.
These Terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates and the emirate of Dubai. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Dubai courts.

sections.title: Use of the Site
content: You agree to use the Site only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others. Specifically, you must not:
list: Use the Site in any way that violates applicable local, national, or international laws
Transmit unsolicited or unauthorised advertising or promotional material
Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Site or its systems
Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract data from the Site
Impersonate any person or misrepresent your identity or affiliation

sections.title: Account Registration
content: To access certain features you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account at concierge@chronos.ae.

sections.title: Products and Pricing
content: All products displayed on the Site are subject to availability. We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time without notice.

Prices are listed in UAE Dirhams (AED) and are inclusive of applicable VAT unless otherwise stated. We reserve the right to modify prices at any time. Price changes will not affect orders that have already been confirmed.

While we strive to ensure all product descriptions and images are accurate, minor variations may occur. Product images are for illustrative purposes and actual products may vary slightly in colour and appearance.

sections.title: Orders and Payment
content: Placing an order constitutes an offer to purchase. We reserve the right to decline or cancel any order at our discretion, including in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock unavailability. You will be notified promptly and any payment received will be fully refunded.
By providing payment details, you confirm that you are authorised to use the payment method and that the information provided is accurate.

sections.title: Returns and Refunds
content: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery, provided the item is in its original, unused condition with all packaging and accompanying documentation intact. To initiate a return, please contact our concierge team.
Bespoke, personalised, or made-to-order pieces are non-returnable unless they arrive damaged or faulty.
Approved refunds will be processed within 5–10 business days to the original payment method.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
content: All content on this Site — including text, images, logos, designs, and software — is the exclusive intellectual property of Chronos LLC or its licensors and is protected by UAE and international copyright laws. Unauthorised reproduction or use of any content is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chronos shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Site or any products purchased. Our total liability in connection with any claim shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the relevant product.

sections.title: Disclaimers
content: The Site and its content are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Site will be error-free, uninterrupted, or free of viruses or other harmful components.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
content: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms at any time. Changes will take effect upon posting to the Site. Continued use of the Site following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.title: Contact
content: For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at concierge@chronos.ae or at our registered office:

sections.title: Overview
content: At Chronos, we are committed to delivering your timepiece with the same level of care and precision that went into crafting it. Every order is handled with the utmost discretion and attention to detail, ensuring your purchase arrives in perfect condition.

sections.title: Processing Time
content: All orders are processed within 1–3 business days of payment confirmation. Orders placed on weekends or UAE public holidays will be processed on the next available business day.
For bespoke or made-to-order pieces, a dedicated Chronos concierge will contact you within 24 hours to discuss delivery timelines.

sections.title: Domestic Shipping (UAE)
content: We offer the following shipping options within the United Arab Emirates:
list: Standard Delivery: 3–5 business days — Complimentary on all orders
Same-Day Delivery (Dubai): Available for select items — AED 85

sections.title: International Shipping
content: We ship worldwide to over 50 countries. International orders are shipped via fully insured, signature-required courier services.
list: GCC Countries: 5–8 business days — Complimentary on orders above AED 2,000
Europe & Americas: 7–12 business days — AED 150 or complimentary on orders above AED 5,000
Asia Pacific: 6–10 business days — AED 120 or complimentary on orders above AED 4,000
post_content: Import duties and taxes applicable in the destination country are the responsibility of the recipient.

sections.title: Order Tracking
content: Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive an email confirmation with a tracking number. You can track your order in real time via the carrier's website or through your Chronos account under My Orders.

sections.title: Packaging
content: Every Chronos piece is packed in our signature presentation box, wrapped in protective material, and placed inside a discreet outer carton. High-value orders are shipped with an additional layer of tamper-evident security sealing.

sections.title: Damaged or Lost Shipments
content: In the unlikely event that your order arrives damaged or is lost in transit, please contact our concierge team within 48 hours of the expected delivery date. We will initiate an investigation and, where applicable, arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you.

sections.title: Contact
content: For shipping inquiries, please reach our team at concierge@chronos.ae or call +971 4 123 4567.

sections.title: Website Content
content: All content on this website, including text, images, product visuals, and design elements, is presented for informational and commercial purposes.
Unauthorized copying, reproduction, or distribution of website materials is not permitted.

sections.title: Brand References
content: Any brand names or references appearing on this website are used strictly for descriptive purposes. All trademarks remain the property of their respective owners.
Chronos operates independently and is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or officially connected to any third-party brand unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: Disclaimer
content: All products are presented as curated luxury pieces. We strive to provide accurate descriptions and visuals; however, slight variations may occur.
Chronos shall not be held liable for any indirect or consequential damages resulting from the use of this website.

sections.title: Governing Law
content: This website and its use shall be governed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: Updates
content: Chronos reserves the right to update this Legal Notice at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: Contact
content: For inquiries, please contact:
